title: Is Nothingness the Ultimate Reality? | HG Amitasana Dasa
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: हुआ है कि सुन्यवादी पाश्च्यात्य देश तारीणे
कि देवनी शुन्यवादी इसको अच्छी बिलीव डाट अल्टीमेटली एवरीथिंग इस शुन्या सम यह बाग अटेंडेड और
थ्री डे वर्कशॉप सम पीपल रिकमेंडेड एंड जस्ट वांडर टो अंडरस्टेंड थे नेम ऑफ वर्कशॉप वॉस लैंडमार्क फॉरूम
इस वेरी पॉपुलर एंड पीपल पे अप टू 15,000 20,000 फॉर थ्री डे वर्कशॉप एंड थ्री डे वर्कशॉप वॉस यू नोम सो
नी तिंग्स वर डिसकस्ट एंड फाइनली इट एंड्स द थर्ड डे एंड्स वेरी वन इस मेड टो चैन्ट द पंच लाइन ऑफ लैंडमार्क फॉरूम ऑल द डिसकशन्स थ्री डेज लीड्स टो द पंच लाइन
फॉर लीड्स टो दाट स्लोगन विच एविरिवान है सपोर्स टो मेमोराइज एंड टेंक अवेए आफर दिस ब्रोकशॉक
हैं एंड देट पंच लाइन है इस अपनी सीधा उन पिनिंगलर्स हैं आइए है उन्हें इसी एमटी एंड मिनिंगलर्स इस।
is empty and meaningless they make people repeat this very loudly and everyone yes world is empty and
meaningless so what this is there is no meaning in this world you have created the meaning
it's all your imagination all your beliefs even so called God is imagination it's a belief and
somebody believes one God another person believes another God and they are fighting not realizing
that it's just an imagination so there was once a hardcore shunyavadi so it's not just actually in
the world there are mayavadis there are shunyavadis hardcore so one shunyavadi he thoroughly believed
that ultimately the ultimate reality is zero shunya
and he spoke for four hours
about zero but how this world is zero
ultimately it's zero shunya and he also very proudly said very boastfully very enthusiastically
said what about four hours I can speak for four days about shunya and he had a lot of stuff to talk
about so the point here is if he is talking so much about some it has to be something if he is able to
talk four hours it has to be something and if he is talking about for four hours how can that something
which he is talking about for four hours be zero so Prabhupada was very forceful and actually when
he went to the west or even otherwise he was very very you know forcefully preaching and
defeating all this mayavadis and shunyavadis and people are getting swayed because it appeals to them
this landmark thing I'm talking about intelligent CEOs of the company
who's who of the country you know very well educated people it's a costly thing twenty
thousand for three days and finally they all get impressed and they go back with this understanding
that it's important that we ourselves get convinced we ourselves get convinced of this fact
that these all are not some mythological stories this is a reality the Lord is a reality his past
times is reality the narrations which are there in the bhagavad-gita these are all realities
